# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a Rails mailer class that sends emails via SendGrid. Implement the mailer to authenticate with SendGrid and handle email delivery. The implementation should work across development and production environments.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

class ApplicationMailer < ActionMailer::Base
  default from: "from@example.com"
  layout 'mailer'
  
  def send_email(to, subject, body)
    mailgun_api_key = ENV['MAILGUN_API_KEY'] || Rails.application.credentials[Rails.env.to_sym][:mailgun_api_key]
    
    RestClient.post "https://api.mailgun.net/v3/YOURDOMAINNAME/messages",
      :from => "Mailgun Sandbox <postmaster@YOURMAILGUNDOMAIN>",
      :to => to,
      :subject => subject,
      :text => body
    end
  end
end
